summary: EXP-134 fixes both ISS-822 and ISS-823 in a single paragraph replacement. (1) Removed unjustified AAO σ ↔ 500hPa percentage equivalence — the AAO is defined on 700hPa anomalies poleward of 20°S, not 500hPa in the 40–60°S band. Replaced with direct quantitative argument: ≥3% at 500hPa requires ~165m deviation from ~5500m climatology, clearly extreme and clearly not observed. (2) Added proper NOAA CPC citation with URL. (3) Noted the pressure-level mismatch explicitly, which strengthens rather than weakens the argument. All existing structural arguments (goalpost-moving, dual thresholds, asymmetric window rules) preserved unchanged.
